rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the load-bearing concept (a cost-aware query router), shows where the draft drifts from it (Lyapunov-based adaptive controller), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast (simple cost-aware query router).
rationale.RX.1: The agent does not flag uncertainty for any claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the name 'LyapRoute' is decorative and not used in the revised artifact).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
